title: Clouded V4
description: Clouded V4 is the long awaited version 4.0 to the clouded texturepack family! It's made for PvP in version 1.8.9!
body:
# **Clouded 16x V4** ❄️
Rise out of the snowstorm, above the clouds, you find a beautiful view as you look down! Clouded V4 brings a mix of deep icy blue & light cloudy blue!

## What is it? 🗺️
A winter-y ice blue themed pack for minigames like Skywars, Bedwars, and Duels!

## What does it contain? 🧭
New textures for weapons, primary tools, skybox, health items, armor, GUI, and some blocks. Intended to be used on versions 1.8 through 1.8.9!

### Performs best with Optifine 🍃
This pack was made with use of optfine in mind, however it is not required.

![Pack by VanillaSpooks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3889775c84046107bcbd901afc5eea59206b4b4f.png)
